job.title: Experienced ELK Consultant M/F
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As an experienced ELK Consultant in Aix-en-Provence, you deploy and manage Elasticsearch / Logstash / Kibana platforms for our clients. You are the team's observability expert.
mission.2: Design ingestion pipelines with Logstash and Filebeat
mission.3: Create Kibana dashboards for monitoring and security
mission.5: Integrate the ELK stack into client environments
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience with la stack Elastic
profile.3: Proficiency in Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana, and Beats
profile.5: Knowledge of information systems security is a plus
